name: Fries

pros.title: strong comfort-food appeal
pros.explanation: A very real reason people like them, even if the nutrition fit is weak.

pros.title: still retains some tuber identity
pros.explanation: Not nutritionally empty, just much worse than stronger tuber forms.

pros.title: satisfying texture and taste
pros.explanation: Part of the real-world appeal, especially for content framing.

cons.title: fried format is a major category negative
cons.explanation: This drags tubers away from the cleaner energy-food role the category is supposed to reward.

cons.title: glycemic behaviour is rough
cons.explanation: A major practical strike against the food in a carb-behaviour category.

cons.title: energy density is much harsher than ideal
cons.explanation: Much easier to overshoot calories than with cleaner tuber forms.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate placeholders for tuning only.
